name: Mauritius Mass Finder
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Fixes around/about/vers/environ/autour so they mean around the requested time rather than after it; preserves after/apres/après as lower-bound intent and adds before/avant as upper-bound intent. Database unchanged.
